Global Coupon Exchange Protocol

THE
INTELLIGENT
EXCHANGE
FOR DIGITAL
VALUE

Connecting Merchants and Distributors Through Secure, Tokenized Digital Commerce

Mezzofy is the digital coupon exchange protocol — powering coupons, vouchers, and gift vouchers through a single tokenized infrastructure.

THE PROTOCOL SHIFT

THE FUTURE OF DIGITAL COUPONS
IS SECURE, STANDARDIZED, AND TOKENIZED

Traditional digital coupon distribution is failing due to fragmentation, high costs, and security risks. We replace the obsolete SaaS model with a high-liquidity Exchange Protocol.

THE OLD WAY

Fragmented SaaS tools
Multiple disconnected platforms, no interoperability
High upfront costs
Subscription fees regardless of performance
Fraud vulnerabilities
No standardized validation — duplicate redemptions common
AI-invisible
Not queryable by AI agents or LLM shopping layers

THE MEZZOFY WAY

From Tool to Network
Network effects and secure settlement at protocol level
Performance-based pricing
Free onboarding — pay only on successful redemption
Unrivaled Security
Every coupon tokenized — unique, fraud-proof digital assets
AI-Native Infrastructure
Machine-readable data — standard interface for AI agents

THE ECOSYSTEM

FROM VISION TO PRODUCTS:
THE MEZZOFY ECOSYSTEM

Our Exchange Protocol powers a complete suite of products across the entire coupon lifecycle.

CORE INFRASTRUCTURE

Coupon Management System

Backend operations for creating and managing coupon inventory

 EXCHANGE LAYER

Coupon Marketplace

Peer-to-peer coupon exchange for B2B, B2C, and C2C

 DISTRIBUTION

Coupon NFC

Physical retail touchpoints via NFC tap-to-redeem

 DISTRIBUTION

Coupon Campaign

Multi-channel campaign management and marketing tools

 CONSUMER

Coupon Wallet

Consumer-facing multi-platform coupon collection

 CONSUMER

Coupon Serial

Unique serialized digital coupon identity per asset

FOR MERCHANTS

TURN COUPON LIABILITIES INTO
HIGH-PERFORMING
DIGITAL ASSETS

Join the Exchange for free and gain instant access to global distribution channels. You only pay when a sale is successfully made and redeemed.

Learn More
01

Zero Upfront Cost

Free onboarding. Pay only a small transaction fee upon final, successful redemption.

02

Flexible Control

Use our Bridge API with your existing CMS, or our free Mezzofy CMS. You dictate the rules.

03

Global Footprint

Instantly expose your inventory to our B2B marketplace, channel partners, and NFC Network.

04

Future-Proof Asset

Your coupons are tokenized, opening possibilities for secondary markets and RWA linkage.

Risk-Free Integration

Free to access. Seamless integration via Bridge API. Pull verified coupons instantly.

KYC verification required to access Exchange

Cash Flow Protection

Consignment model — partial deposit for large enterprises, bulk charged on redemption.

Standardized Quality

All coupons adhere to Mezzofy Coupon Standard — fraud-proof, perfect redemption.

FOR DISTRIBUTORS

ACCESS THE WORLD'S MOST
SECURE
COUPON INVENTORY

Enhance your loyalty program, banking app, or corporate HR portal with real-time, verified digital coupon inventory.

Learn More

For Developers

BUILD ON THE
EXCHANGE PROTOCOL

Integrate coupon functionality into any platform with a developer-first REST API, multi-language SDKs, and comprehensive coupon functions.

API

RESTful API with OAuth 2.0 and webhook support for real-time events

→Bridge API
→Management API
→AI Agent API

SDK

Official SDKs for every major platform — idiomatic libraries

JS/TS Python PHP iOS Android React Native

Coupon Functions

Full lifecycle control from issuance to redemption validation

→coupon.issue()
→coupon.validate()
→inventory.query()
→campaign.manage()
View API Docs & Get Started

For AI Commerce

THE COUPON INFRASTRUCTURE
FOR AI AGENTS

When an LLM recommends a deal, it comes from the Mezzofy Exchange — tokenized, fraud-proof, and ready to redeem.

Explore AI Commerce
LIVE · SEP 2025
ChatGPT — Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP)
Instant Checkout inside chat
900M+
weekly users
ANNOUNCED · JAN 2026
Google Gemini — Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP)
Shopping Graph, Maps, Search, Assistant
45B
item graph
EXPANDING
Kimi & Regional AI — MCP / REST API
CN + HK + TW market access
CN+
market access

EXCHANGE CORE

WHERE COMMERCE
MEETS SECURITY

Our Layer 2 Core transforms simple promotional codes into unique, trackable digital assets.

1

Standardization & Tokenization

Every digital coupon is tokenized upon ingestion, converting it into a secure, single-use digital asset.

2

Asset Linkage

Foundation for linking to Real-World Assets (RWA), expanding into the Web3/DeFi asset space.

3

Clearinghouse

The core manages all consignment, financial reconciliation, and fraudless validation.

READY TO JOIN THE EXCHANGE?

List your inventory as a merchant, access verified coupons as a distributor, or integrate via API as a developer.
